tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Have You Ever Seen The Rain

content:
"We Belong"
                                     Pat Benatar

Transcribed by ViviEatWorld

Special chords
C7:     032310
Fsus4:  133311 


[Intro]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
We belong, we belong to the light.[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  Many times I've tried to tell you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
  Many times I've cried alone,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  Always I'm surprised how well you[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bb[/ch]
  Cut my feelings to the bone.[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
  Don't wanna leave you really,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
  I've invested too much time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
  To give you up that easy[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
  To the doubts that complicate your mind.[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
  We belong to the light,[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
  We belong to the thunder,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
  We belong to the sound of the words[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
  We've both fallen under.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
  Whatever we deny or embrace[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
  For worse or for better,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C7[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
  We belong, we belong,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
  We belong together.[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  Maybe it's a sign of weakness[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
  When I don't know what to say,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  Maybe I just wouldn't know[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
  What to do with my strength anyway.[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
  Have we become a habit?[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
  Do we distort the facts[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
  Now there's no looking forward,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
  Now there's no turning back?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
  When you say[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
  We belong to the light,[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
  We belong to the thunder,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
  We belong to the sound of the words[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
  We've both fallen under.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
  Whatever we deny or embrace[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
  For worse or for better,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C7[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
  We belong, we belong,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
  We belong together.[/tab]


[tab]      [ch]F[/ch] ...       [ch]Fsus4[/ch]
                  [play this chord just before Verse 5 begins][/tab]


[Verse 5]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  Close your eyes and try to sleep now,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
  Close your eyes and try to dream,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  Clear your mind and do your best[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
  To try and wash the palette clean.[/tab]


[Verse 6]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
  We can't begin to know it[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]
  How much we really care,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
  I hear your voice inside me,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
  I see your face everywhere,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]
  Still you say[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
  We belong to the light,[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
  We belong to the thunder,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
  We belong to the sound of the words[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
  We've both fallen under.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
  Whatever we deny or embrace[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
  For worse or for better,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C7[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
  We belong, we belong,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
  We belong together.[/tab]


[Repeat chorus and fade out]


Enjoy!
Viv.
